title: Accessibility at the Public Health Agency of Canada (PHAC) - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility at the Public Health Agency of Canada (PHAC)
Accessibility plans, progress reports, and how to provide feedback
Accessibility feedback form

## Services and information

### Accessibility plans and Progress reports
Plans outline how PHAC will eliminate barriers to accessibility, the reports detail our progress towards making Canada barrier-free by 2040

### Ways to provide feedback
Ways to provide feedback about accessibility

### Accessibility feedback process
Description of how we receive and respond to your feedback on accessibility
Dental care, education, veterans, pension plan, tax credits, deductions and more
